what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-ef5a0aa3 in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-6b03e283, marking it as type board_items and recording when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter with no body content.
target uses the URI form board://item-6b03e283.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI pointing to a specific board item.
The attachment_type board_items signals a channel-to-board linkage.
It functions as a lightweight join record rather than content storage.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter for structured metadata.
Id prefix att- indicates an attachment record.
Target uses a custom board:// URI scheme.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit UTC offset.
concerns: No title, description, or content explains what is attached.
The referenced board item is not resolvable from this file alone.
No author or provenance is recorded.
Empty body means the attachment semantics rely entirely on the target URI.
notes: A bare channel attachment pointer that records when board item item-6b03e283 was attached to dragnet-development, but carries no embedded content or context.
questions: What does board item item-6b03e283 represent?
What content or artifact is being attached via this record?
Who added the attachment and why?
What are the exact semantics of the board_items attachment_type?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment; the actual content is a minimal link/timestamp record, so its role is linkage rather than storing attached content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory at a precise time, creating a traceable channel-to-board edge.
novelty: It uses a board:// URI target and an attachment_type of board_items, making it a domain-specific pointer rather than an embedded content attachment.
contribution: It preserves the fact that attachment att-ef5a0aa3 in the dragnet-development channel points to board item item-6b03e283 and was added at the recorded time, providing a channel-to-board edge for later fusion.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record in the dragnet-development channel that links attachment att-ef5a0aa3 to board item item-6b03e283 as type board_items with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and timestamp the attachment of a board item to the dragnet-development channel memory.
